title: chloraea parviflora
intro: Chloraea parviflora, also known as the miniature chloraea, is a species of orchid found in New Zealand, known for its small, delicate flowers and unique growth habit. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in New Zealand, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Chloraea parviflora is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially exhibiting antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
